name: Medusa Ransomware
description: [Medusa Ransomware](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1244) has been utilized in attacks since at least 2021. [Medusa Ransomware](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1244) has been known to be utilized in conjunction with living off the land techniques and remote management software.
